insight: Idempotent push via UNIQUE(eventId) + client-side rebase of pending events silently diverges on retry-after-lost-ack: server acks original content, client holds rebased content. Requires content-hash guard on dedup (reject mismatched retries loudly) + single in-flight push + own-update reconciliation on pull.

codex CLI at /opt/homebrew is ENOENT-broken (missing platform binary @openai/codex-darwin-arm64 vendor path) — codex exec fails despite auth probe passing. Fix: npm install -g @openai/codex. Claude-subagent fallback works well meanwhile.
